prompt:
High-end automotive photography (intended use).
Scene: a cobblestone alleyway at golden hour, worn brick walls on both sides, soft warm sun raking from the left casting long shadows.
Subject: a vintage cafe-racer motorcycle parked in the center, photorealistic.
Key details: matte deep British-Racing-Green paint, brown leather seat, polished chrome exhaust, spoke wheels; a small wooden crate beside the bike with an old leather helmet on top; shallow depth of field with background bokeh; cinematic composition.
Constraints: no people, no text, no brand logos on the bike, no watermark.
